sectionTitle: Choice, Anxiety, and the Art of Simplification | 選擇、焦慮與簡化的藝術

samples.meaning: a choice; an option; an alternative
samples.pinyin: zhège xuǎnxiàng bù shìhé wǒ.
samples.en: This option is not suitable for me.

samples.meaning: a choice; an option; an alternative
samples.pinyin: wǒ méiyǒu gèng duō de xuǎnxiàng.
samples.en: I don't have more options.

samples.meaning: to make a choice (between several alternatives)
samples.sentence: 對於消費者來説，選項非常多。
samples.pinyin: duìyú xiāofèi zhě lái shuō, xuǎnxiàng fēicháng duō.
samples.en: For consumers, there are many choices.

samples.meaning: to make a choice (between several alternatives)
samples.sentence: 對於投資者來説，選項重要。
samples.pinyin: duìyú tóuzī zhě lái shuō, xuǎnxiàng zhòngyào.
samples.en: Options are important for investors.

items.en: to be deeply involved in; to be stuck in

samples.sentence: 他有著深陷的眼眶，顯得疲憊。
samples.pinyin: Tā yǒu zhe shēn xiàn de yǎn kuàng, xiǎn de pí bèi.
samples.en: He has deep-set eye sockets and looks tired.

samples.meaning: to be deeply in (trouble, debt etc)
samples.pinyin: Tā shēn xiàn jù é zhài wù zhōng.
samples.en: He is deeply trapped in huge debt.

samples.pinyin: tā duì kǎoshì hěn jiāolǜ.
samples.en: She is very anxious about the exam.

samples.pinyin: tā kàn qǐlái hěn jiāolǜ.
samples.en: He looks very anxious.

samples.sentence: 即便你當頭頭，也不該擺架子。
samples.pinyin: jí biàn nǐ dāng tóu tóu, yě bù gāi bǎi jià zi.
samples.en: You shouldn't put on airs even if you were in charge.

samples.pinyin: jíbiàn shuō cuòle yě bùyàojǐn.
samples.en: Even if you say it wrong, it doesn't matter.
samples.vi: Cho dù bạn nói sai cũng không sao cả.

samples.sentence: 我深感榮倖能參加這次活動。
samples.pinyin: wǒ shēn gǎn róngxìng néng cānjiā zhè cì huódòng.
samples.en: I feel deeply honored to participate in this event.
samples.vi: Tôi cảm thấy vô cùng vinh dự khi có thể tham gia sự kiện lần này.

samples.sentence: 看到大傢的笑容，我深感快樂。
samples.pinyin: kàn dào dàjiā de xiàoróng, wǒ shēn gǎn kuàilè.
samples.en: Seeing everyone’s smiles, I feel deeply happy.
samples.vi: Nhìn thấy nụ cười của mọi người, tôi cảm nhận sâu sắc niềm vui.

samples.pinyin: wǒ juéde yǒudiǎnr yíhàn.
samples.en: I feel a bit regretful.
samples.vi: Tôi cảm thấy có chút tiếc nuối.

samples.pinyin: tā gǎndào fēicháng yíhàn.
samples.en: He feels very regretful.
samples.vi: Anh ấy cảm thấy vô cùng đáng tiếc.

samples.pinyin: zhè shì wǒ zuìdà de yíhàn.
samples.en: This is my biggest regret.
samples.vi: Đây là sự tiếc nuối lớn nhất của tôi.

samples.pinyin: rénshēng nánmiǎn yǒu yíhàn.
samples.en: Life inevitably has regrets.
samples.vi: Cuộc đời không tránh khỏi những tiếc nuối.

items.vi: lấy điều này làm vinh dự

samples.sentence: 我以為是誰呢，原來是你。
samples.pinyin: wǒ yǐwéi shì shéi ne, yuánlái shì nǐ.
samples.en: I thought it was someone else, but it turns out it's you.

samples.pinyin: wǒ yǐwéi nǐ yǐjīng zǒule.
samples.en: I thought you had already left.

samples.sentence: 請以此類推完成剩餘題目。
samples.pinyin: Qǐng yǐ cǐ lèi tuī wánchéng shèngyú tímù.

samples.sentence: 這道題舉一反三以此類推。
samples.pinyin: zhè dào tí jǔ yī fǎn sān yǐ cǐ lèi tuī
samples.en: Use this problem to infer others by analogy.

samples.pinyin: déguó xīnlǐxuéjiā fúluòmǔ

samples.pinyin: Guǒ jiāo kě yǐ shǐ guǒ jiàng biàn zhòu.

samples.pinyin: guǒjiàng pèi suānnǎi hěn hǎochī.
samples.en: Jam with yogurt tastes really good.

samples.pinyin: ménkǒu yǒu yīgè xié jiàzi.

samples.sentence: 我需要一個架子掛衣服。
samples.pinyin: wǒ xūyào yīgè jiàzi guà yīfu.
samples.en: I need a rack to hang an item of clothing.

samples.meaning: taste of food; the flavour of food
samples.pinyin: zhège cài de kǒuwèi hěn hǎo.
samples.en: This dish tastes very good.

samples.meaning: taste of food; the flavour of food
samples.pinyin: zhè zhǒng bǐnggān kǒuwèi dútè.
samples.en: These cookies have a unique flavor.

samples.pinyin: tā xǐhuān dǎzhé shí gòuwù.
samples.en: She enjoys shopping when there are discounts.

samples.pinyin: zhèjiànyīfúdǎzhéma?

samples.pinyin: zhè běn shū shēn shēn xīyǐnle wǒ.
samples.en: This book deeply attracted me.
samples.vi: Cuốn sách này đã thu hút tôi.

samples.sentence: 花朵吸引蜜蜂前來採蜜。
samples.pinyin: huāduǒ xīyǐn mìfēng qián lái cǎi mì.
samples.en: Flowers attract bees to gather honey.
samples.vi: Những bông hoa thu hút ong đến lấy mật.

samples.pinyin: gōngsī yīnggāi wèi gùkè zhuóxiǎng.
samples.en: The company should think of its customers.
samples.vi: Công ty nên suy nghĩ cho khách hàng.

samples.sentence: 我們要了解顧客的心理。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen yào liǎojiě gùkè de xīnlǐ.
samples.en: We need to understand the psychology of customers.
samples.vi: Chúng ta phải tìm hiểu tâm lý khách hàng.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuān chī píngguǒ.
samples.en: I like eating apples.
samples.vi: Tớ thích ăn táo.

samples.pinyin: xiǎo háizi zhèngzài chī nǎi.
samples.en: The child is drinking milk.

samples.sentence: 他們過著缺吃/喫少穿的生活。
samples.pinyin: tāmenguòzhe quē chī shǎo chuān de shēnghuó.
samples.en: They live a life of hunger and poverty.
samples.vi: Họ sống cuộc sống thiếu ăn thiếu mặc.

samples.sentence: 現在還有很多人都缺吃/喫少穿。
samples.pinyin: xiànzài hái yǒu hěnduō rén dōu quē chī shǎo chuān.
samples.en: Many people still lack basic necessities.
samples.vi: Hiện nay còn có rất nhiều người thiếu ăn thiếu mặc.

samples.sentence: 口吃/喫是不自信的錶現。
samples.pinyin: kǒuchī shì bù zìxìn de biǎoxiàn.
samples.en: Stuttering is a sign of low self-confidence.

samples.sentence: 小明因為緊張而口吃/喫。
samples.pinyin: xiǎomíng yīnwèi jǐnzhāng ér kǒuchī.
samples.en: Xiao Ming stutters due to nervousness.

samples.meaning: to remain; to stay for a long time
samples.sentence: 我們在武漢停留了一天。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen zài wǔhàn tíngliúle yītiān.
samples.en: We stayed in Wuhan for one day.
samples.vi: Chúng tôi dừng lại ở Vũ Hán một ngày.

samples.meaning: to remain; to stay for a long time
samples.sentence: 火車在站臺停留了十分鍾。
samples.pinyin: huǒchē zài zhàntái tíngliúle shí fēnzhōng.
samples.en: The train stayed at the platform for ten minutes.
samples.vi: Tàu hỏa đã dừng lại ở sân ga 10 phút.

samples.sentence: 選擇前者還是後者，你決定。
samples.pinyin: xuǎnzé qiánzhě háishì hòu zhě, nǐ juédìng.
samples.en: Choose the former or the latter, it's up to you.
samples.vi: Chọn cái trước hay cái sau, bạn tự quyết định.

samples.sentence: 你覺得他選前者還是後者？
samples.pinyin: nǐ juéde tā xuǎn qiánzhě háishì hòu zhě?
samples.en: Do you think he chose the former or the latter?
samples.vi: Bạn nghĩ anh ấy chọn cái trước hay cái sau?

samples.sentence: 學習和玩耍，我選擇前者。

samples.en: I choose studying rather than playing.
samples.vi: Học và chơi, tôi chọn học.

samples.sentence: 走路和騎車，前者更省錢。
samples.pinyin: zǒulù hé qí chē, qiánzhě gèng shěng qián.
samples.en: Walking is cheaper than cycling.
samples.vi: Đi bộ và đi xe, đi bộ tiết kiệm hơn.

samples.pinyin: jūrán yǒu zhè zhǒng shì!
samples.en: Can't imagine such a thing exists!

samples.pinyin: tā jūrán huì xiāngxìn zhè jiàn shì!

samples.pinyin: zēngzhǎngle sì bèi.

samples.pinyin: sān de sān bèi shì jiǔ.

samples.pinyin: tā jīntiān kàn qǐlái bèi piàoliang.
samples.en: She looks even more beautiful today.

samples.pinyin: wǒ bèi xǐhuan zhège lǐwù.
samples.en: I especially like this gift.

samples.meaning: exceed (be beyond) one's expectations; unexpected; unforeseen; surprising

samples.pinyin: zhège jiéjú zhēnshi chū hū yìliào.
samples.en: This ending was really unexpected.
samples.vi: Kết cục này thật ngoài dự kiến.

samples.meaning: exceed (be beyond) one's expectations; unexpected; unforeseen; surprising
samples.sentence: 他竟齣乎意料地考上了。
samples.pinyin: tā jìng chū hū yìliào dì kǎo shàngle.
samples.en: He unexpectedly passed the exam.
samples.vi: Anh ấy thi đỗ thật bất ngờ.

samples.meaning: for this reason; on this account
samples.sentence: 以此，我們應該在這次航行中格外小心謹慎。
samples.pinyin: yǐ cǐ, wǒmen yīnggāi zài zhè cì hángxíng zhōng géwài xiǎoxīn jǐnshèn.

samples.sentence: 他通過細節推論齣結果。
samples.pinyin: tā tōngguò xìjié tuīlùn chū jiéguǒ.
samples.en: He deduced the result through details.

samples.sentence: 你能從這些信息中推論齣什麼？

samples.pinyin: zhè shì yī zhǒng hélǐ de tuīlùn.

samples.pinyin: wǒ xūyào dé chū xīn de tuīlùn.

samples.pinyin: xiàn dài rén shēng huó jié zòu kuài
samples.en: Modern people live at a fast pace.

samples.pinyin: xiàn dài rén cháng cháng máng lù gōng zuò
samples.en: Modern people are often busy with work.

samples.meaning: what is called; what is known as; what is meant by
samples.sentence: 所謂的成功，就是不斷努力。
samples.pinyin: suǒwèi de chénggōng, jiùshì bùduàn nǔlì.

samples.meaning: what is called; what is known as; what is meant by

samples.sentence: 小鳥在天上自由地飛翔。
samples.pinyin: xiǎo niǎo zài tiānshàng zìyóu de fēixiáng.

samples.sentence: 我現在一個人生活，很自由。
samples.pinyin: wǒ xiànzài yīgè rén shēnghuó, hěn zìyóu.

samples.sentence: 失去自由是一件很可怕的事。
samples.pinyin: shīqù zìyóu shì yī jiàn hěn kěpà de shì.

samples.sentence: 追求自由是每個人的權利。

samples.sentence: 他沒生氣，反而笑了起來。
samples.pinyin: tā méi shēngqì, fǎn'ér xiàole qǐlái.

samples.pinyin: tā fùdānle suǒyǒu de fèiyòng.

samples.pinyin: wǒ bùxiǎng fùdān zhège rènwù.

samples.pinyin: tā nǔlì jiǎnqīng jīngjì fùdān.

samples.meaning: have no way (of doing sth.); not be in a position (to do sth.)

samples.pinyin: zhè yī diǎn duì wù lǐ xué shèn zhì gèng shì yòng.

samples.sentence: 她甚至連 “再見”都沒説就走了。

samples.sentence: 這個方法比之前的更好。

samples.pinyin: wǒmen huì jìnlì zuò dào gèng hǎo.

samples.pinyin: tā gěile wǒ yīgè jīhuì.

samples.pinyin: Píngbái ái yī dùn mà
samples.en: Get scolded for no reason
